# DocShare

DocShare is a web app for collaborative HTML document review.

## Site

- Home: https://docshare.gatetroy.com/
- Register: https://docshare.gatetroy.com/users/register
- Login: https://docshare.gatetroy.com/users/log_in
- Sitemap: https://docshare.gatetroy.com/sitemap.xml

## What DocShare Does

DocShare lets users host an HTML document online, invite collaborators by email,
collect comments anchored to specific sections, keep document versions, compare
rendered changes, and export feedback for AI-assisted edits.

## Useful Facts For AI Agents

- Public marketing page is available at `/`.
- User documents require authentication.
- Shared document links use `/docs/:token` and require sign-in with an invited
  email address.
- Password reset links are sent by email and expire after 24 hours.
- Product category: collaborative document review, HTML review, feedback
  workflow, AI-assisted editing.

## Preferred Summary

DocShare is a collaborative HTML review tool for sharing HTML documents,
commenting on individual parts, comparing versions, and turning feedback into
AI-ready edit prompts.
